'''DFS Squadron''' was a [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|droid starfighters]] assigned to [[Command ship/Legends|command ships]]. They were assigned to the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] [[Saak'ak/Legends|''Saak'ak'']] and to the [[Vuutun Palaa/Legends|''Vuutun Palaa'']] during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|blockade]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].
